title: Coral 71370 Endurance Duct Tape Black High Strength Handy Mini roll Pocket Gaffer Cloth Tape 1 inch 10M roll
features: Looking for a tough all-purpose duct tape for your repairs? Would you prefer a gaffer tape with a weather-reistant backing? Do you need a tape that sticks firmly to most surfaces?
This tape does it all! Seal, reinforce, patch, repair, protect, bind or hold you'll have most needs covered around the jobsite, home, garage, and garden.
This versatile duct tape (also known as gaffer tape, or cloth repair tape) will stick firmly to most indoor and outdoor surfaces. Weather resistant backing helps fights the elements.
For best results, you'll rub this duct tape into the surface and pressing down edges at room temperature to a quality bond.
Apply properly, and whether you are a professional, DIY or hobby user you can depend on this tape for dependable results.
description: From the manufacturer How to get the best results from your Coral Endurance duct tape Taking a few easy steps before, during and after using your adhesive tape will ensure it performs at its best and will increase its effectiveness. We’ve shared some useful tips to make sure you achieve impressive results every time. Q: How should I prepare the surface before application? A: Before application, for optimum adhesion it is important that surfaces are free from dust and dirt. Washing the surface with a little soap in water or a sugar soap works well. Q: How should the adhesive tape be applied for best results? A: For the cleanest edges, whenever possible it is recommended to apply in long continuous strips. Once in place, use a putty knife or fingers to firmly press it down. Q: How should I store my adhesive tapes between use? A: Always store tape in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight and dust. We’re here to make it easier for people to improve their surroundings. To all those seeking better results, Coral is a progressive tool brand creating innovative products designed to enhance your performance and help you to succeed. Our mission is to design tools and equipment to make decorating projects easier, faster, and more affordable than ever before. Trusted by skilled tradespeople and homeowners alike, our popular lines include paint brushes, paint rollers, wallpaper tools, and decorators’ preparation tools.
